response.justification: Sarah's current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development—exactly the problem space this role addresses. However, she presents significant gaps against stated requirements: only ~1 year of documented AI-specific experience (the job requires 8+), no Python listed despite it being a required language, and no explicit evidence of vector database or RAG architecture work. Her strong 19-year technical foundation, Staff-level experience, and perfect current-role alignment suggest she could grow into the position quickly, but she may not meet the minimum bar for a Staff-level hire without demonstrable AI systems background.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators is precisely aligned with this role's core responsibilities
19 years of software development with multiple Staff/Senior positions demonstrating leadership, mentorship, and technical depth across complex systems
Strong TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), data systems (real-time, high-volume), and proven ability to work with evolving technology stacks
concerns: Only ~1 year of documented AI-specific experience; job requires 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions, and prior roles don't show AI systems work
No Python listed despite being a required language; resume shows TypeScript, JavaScript, DLang, C++, but not Python
No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)—key technologies for this role

key_factors.factor: Missing 8+ years AI systems experience history
No Python; missing RAG/vector DB documentation
